response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience and strong technical leadership qualities, his background is predominantly in web, full-stack, and DLang development. He lacks the deep, recent C++ architecture experience, industrial cybersecurity knowledge (IEC 62443), and specific IoT protocol expertise essential for this Senior Manager role in industrial automation.
strengths: Over 10 years of software engineering experience with a strong background in distributed systems and microservices.
Possesses advantageous skills listed in the job description, including React, Node.js, and REST API development.
Demonstrated leadership and mentorship capabilities through organizing workshops, founding an open-source platform, and serving in Staff Engineer roles.
concerns: Severe lack of recent and extensive C++ experience, which is the primary core technical competency required for this role.
No demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Missing background in industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA) and message-broker-based C++ architectures.
